strengths: Proven experience with high-performance distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows (re:cinq)
Demonstrated technical leadership in scaling teams and adopting disciplined engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in the resume, which is critical for this role
No explicit mention of production-grade multi-agent AI systems beyond tooling contributions (MCP/code generators)
Short tenure at re:cinq (current role since April 2025) may not yet demonstrate sustained executive impact
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical leadership and distributed-systems expertise, with relevant experience in AI-agent tooling and high-performance systems. However, the resume lacks clear evidence of fintech-specific domain knowledge (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management) or hands-on multi-agent AI systems at scale, which are critical for this role. His background in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments is also not explicitly highlighted.
